items.name: Concept Gap
items.description: You do not know how to start or which formula/concept to use.
examples: Do not know whether to use probability or counting
fix: Write 1-line trigger rule for that topic

items.name: Careless / Execution Error
items.description: You know the method but make calculation, sign, unit, or reading mistakes.
fix: Use a mini checklist before final answer
Circle trap words in the question

items.name: Trap Error
items.description: You know the topic but fall for a common exam trap.
examples: Average speed taken as average of two speeds
Increase 20% then decrease 20% assumed zero net effect
fix: Tag each wrong question with trap label

items.name: Percent / Ratio / Mixture
fix: Use multiplier for repeated percentage change
For mixture, track pure substance not only total volume

items.name: Log / Algebra
fix: Check domain before and after solving

items.name: Geometry / Trig
fix: Check whether angle is in degrees or radians

items.name: Kinematics
fix: List u, v, a, t, s first
Do not use constant-acceleration formulas unless acceleration is constant

items.name: Force / Momentum / Energy
fix: Check whether momentum or energy is conserved

items.name: Fluid / Electricity / Waves / Heat
fix: For echo and heat mix problems, watch hidden factor and equilibrium condition

items.name: Pass 1
fix: Do easy and medium questions first
Skip any question that blocks you for more than 60 to 90 seconds

items.name: Pass 2
fix: Do not let one hard question kill time
